calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-13-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:37am
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Both parties are present and are sworn. Marsha Lee Nichols, Respondent, testifies in the narrative; Rosalie Damante, Appellant, testifies in the narrative. Justin Guerrero Hobs and Heidi Hobbs, also sworn, testify for the Appellant.
EXH1R police report
EXH2(A) medical bills
EXH3(A) Packet of various papers
EXHRA(R) Packet of evidence including photos
Georgia Dantonio, previously sworn, testifies for the Respondent, Marsha Lee Nichols.
10:16am
Matter is submitted. Evidence is retained.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-17-2009 Continued To Mar-11-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 9:25am
Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig, nothing on record, clerk-beth wilber, Dept. 525
Appellant, Marsha Lee Nichols, appears in Pro Per; Respondent, Mary Rosalie Damante, appears in Pro Per.
Ms. Georgia Dentonio appears for the Respondent, Mary Rosalie Damante, to request a continuance; Appellant, Marsha Lee Nichols, appears in Pro Per.
Ms. Dentonio requests a continuance based on a Doctor's note, that Ms. Damante was recovering from surgery, and could not appear. Ms. Nichols objects to the continuance stating it has been continued too many times already.
9:30am
Judge Fleisig grants a continuance to Mar-11-09, 9:00am. There will be no more continuances allowed. Court to send notice.
